category_sources: source_facts.description says it loads/unloads environment variables based on $PWD; official direnv docs describe shell environment management.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name; official GitHub README uses the name direnv.
docs_sources: Official homepage has a dedicated /docs section; official GitHub README also contains project usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/direnv/direnv; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official GitHub README describes shell hooks and directory-specific environment variables.
